nodes.label: ∅ | dwelt | hunter
nodes.sentence: In a secluded part of the Black Forest, where dense pines stretched endlessly and woodland creatures thrived, there dwelt a hunter named Weißfalke—the White Falcon.

nodes.label: he | return | ∅
nodes.sentence: Renowned among his village for unmatched skill and fortune, he returned each evening bearing a generous spoil.

nodes.label: eye | flicker | fire
nodes.sentence: His stature was as sturdy as the towering firs, his eyes flickered with youthful fire, and no shadowed glen or rugged trail eluded his keen sight.

nodes.label: weißfalke | venture | ∅
nodes.sentence: One day, driven by restless curiosity, Weißfalke ventured farther than ever before, emerging into an open clearing that revealed a vast meadow stretching under a pale sky—the Landes, a sweeping plain where wild grasses swayed blue-gray and wildflowers gleamed like scattered jewels.

nodes.label: he | stumble | circle
nodes.sentence: As he wandered without a path, savoring the crisp air scented with pine resin and fresh earth, he stumbled upon a curious circle pressed into the meadow, a ring where the grass and blossoms seemed bent inward as if trod gently round and round.

nodes.label: twig | disturb | perfection
nodes.sentence: Yet no trace of footprints led to or from it—no crushed leaf nor snapped twig disturbed the perfection of the sod.

nodes.label: ∅ | conceal | himself
nodes.sentence: Perplexed, Weißfalke concealed himself nearby, watching intently.

nodes.label: melody | waft | air
nodes.sentence: Soon, faint melodies, pure and haunting, wafted through the air.

nodes.label: he | lift | gaze
nodes.sentence: He lifted his gaze skyward, and as the music faded to a whisper, he beheld a small cloud-like basket descending gracefully.

nodes.label: it | grow | delicate
nodes.sentence: At first delicate as a wisp, it grew steadily larger until it revealed twelve sisters of radiant beauty, their forms as graceful as forest nymphs, their eyes bright as mountain lakes.

nodes.label: they | leapt | ∅
nodes.sentence: As their basket touched earth within the ring, they leapt out and commenced a lively dance, their feet striking a glowing orb that sang enchanting tunes, keeping rhythm with their joyous movements.

nodes.label: heart | steal | ∅
nodes.sentence: Hidden in the shadows, Weißfalke watched spellbound, admiring them all; yet his heart was stolen by the youngest, whose laughter shimmered like the silver Danube.

nodes.label: he | spring | ∅
nodes.sentence: Unable to remain a silent witness, he sprang forth to claim her, but at his approach, the sisters, swift as the forest birds, leapt back into their basket and were lifted away, disappearing into the misty heights.

nodes.label: weißfalke | gaze | basket
nodes.sentence: Sorrow-filled, Weißfalke gazed long after the basket fading into clouds.

nodes.label: he | sigh | ∅
nodes.sentence: “They are gone,” he sighed, “never to grace my sight again.”

nodes.label: longing | let | ∅
nodes.sentence: But longing would not let him rest.

nodes.label: he | return | hour
nodes.sentence: The following day, at the same hour, he returned.

nodes.label: he | assume | shape
nodes.sentence: To trick the sisters, he assumed the shape of a sable, blending into the underbrush near the enchanted ring, pretending to forage quietly.

nodes.label: basket | appear | ∅
nodes.sentence: The basket appeared as before, the sweet melodies drawing near.

nodes.label: they | flee | song
nodes.sentence: Yet the moment the sisters glimpsed him, startled, they fled skyward in song.

nodes.label: ∅ | muse | sister
nodes.sentence: “Perhaps they wish to test our mortal wiles,” mused the eldest sister as they hovered.

nodes.label: nay | let | ∅
nodes.sentence: “Nay,” the youngest replied, “let us rise quickly.”

nodes.label: voice | unite | chant
nodes.sentence: Their voices united in a chant, and the basket vanished among the clouds.

nodes.label: heart | shed | guise
nodes.sentence: Heart heavy, Weißfalke shed his guise and returned alone to his forest cabin, the days ahead bitter and long without his beloved.

nodes.label: he | seek | stratagem
nodes.sentence: Determined, on the third day he sought a new stratagem.

nodes.label: he | nestle | creature
nodes.sentence: Adopting the form of a mouse himself, he nestled among the little creatures, eyes sharp, ever watching the sky.

nodes.label: sister | descend | time
nodes.sentence: At the appointed time, the sisters descended as usual, resuming their dance and play.

nodes.label: ∅ | notice | stump
nodes.sentence: The youngest noticed the stump.

nodes.label: that | be | ∅
nodes.sentence: “That was not here before!”

nodes.label: she | cry | ∅
nodes.sentence: she cried, fleeing toward the basket.

nodes.label: sister | smile | ∅
nodes.sentence: Her sisters smiled kindly and poked the stump, revealing the startled mice — among them Weißfalke.

nodes.label: they | catch | all
nodes.sentence: They swiftly caught all but one, who scampered wildly.

nodes.label: pursue | stand | ∅
nodes.sentence: The youngest pursued, raising a slender silver wand to strike the little creature, when suddenly the White Falcon stood, embracing the youngest sister in his arms.

nodes.label: eleven | flee | basket
nodes.sentence: Eleven of the sisters fled upward in their basket, leaving the young one behind.

nodes.label: ∅ | delight | ∅
nodes.sentence: Weißfalke tended his bride with devoted care—wiping away her tears, recounting tales of hunting and earthbound delights.

nodes.label: they | walk | forest
nodes.sentence: Together they walked past the whispering forest to his humble home, where joy blossomed like the springtime crocus, and their hearts beat in harmony.

nodes.label: seasons | turn | winter
nodes.sentence: Seasons turned—the cold winters and warm summers—and soon their happiness was crowned by a son, fair and strong, the light of stars mingled with earthly vigor.

nodes.label: maiden | long | father
nodes.sentence: But the celestial maiden longed for her father among the stars.

nodes.label: she | fashion | basket
nodes.sentence: Hidden from her husband, she fashioned a delicate woven basket and gathered rare forest treasures and sweetest food, planning a secret voyage home.

nodes.label: she | enter | ring
nodes.sentence: One day, with Weißfalke away hunting, she entered the enchanted ring with her child.

nodes.label: she | rise | basket
nodes.sentence: Singing a mournful, haunting melody, she rose skyward in the shimmering basket.

nodes.label: he | reach | they
nodes.sentence: Though Weißfalke rushed to the meadow, he could not reach them before they vanished into the heavens.

nodes.label: he | cry | vain
nodes.sentence: He cried out in vain as they became a twinkling light fading beyond the clouds.

nodes.label: world | dim | ∅
nodes.sentence: Grief overtook him; his world dimmed.

nodes.label: winter | pass | ∅
nodes.sentence: Winter and summer passed.

nodes.label: ∅ | mourn | wife
nodes.sentence: Weißfalke mourned his lost wife and son, whose visage combined her light with his strength.

nodes.label: maiden | forget | sorrow
nodes.sentence: Meanwhile, in the starry realm, the maiden soon forgot her earthly sorrow amid her father’s celestial splendor.

nodes.label: son | grow | ∅
nodes.sentence: Yet her son grew restless, yearning to know his origins.

nodes.label: chief | speak | daughter
nodes.sentence:
The Star Chief spoke to his daughter:

“Go, child, and bring your son to his father, bidding him come join us.

nodes.label: ∅ | tell | he
nodes.sentence: But tell him he must bring the gifts of all beasts and birds he encounters in his hunts.”

nodes.label: voice | bear | wind
nodes.sentence: So they descended to earth, their voices borne on the crisp night wind.

nodes.label: ∅ | recognize | they
nodes.sentence: Weißfalke, ever near the enchanted ring, recognized them at once, embracing wife and son.

nodes.label: he | heed | message
nodes.sentence: He heeded the message and hunted with urgent zeal, collecting token feathers, tails, and paws of creatures rare and wondrous.

nodes.label: weißfalke | visit | place
nodes.sentence: When all was ready, Weißfalke visited cherished places—the hilltops gazing east at dawn, the brook where he played as a youth, his lonely lodge now heavy with memory—and at last the enchanted ring.

nodes.label: he | enter | basket
nodes.sentence: There, hand in hand with wife and son, he entered the glowing basket, rising beyond the reach of dark forests or mortal sight.

nodes.label: chief | welcome | all
nodes.sentence: Upon arrival, the Star Chief welcomed all to a grand feast and proclaimed that each might choose to remain as they were or become one with the earthly gifts brought forth.

nodes.label: confusion | take | paw
nodes.sentence: A lively confusion ensued—some took paws, some wings, tails, or claws.

nodes.label: other | become | bird
nodes.sentence: Those choosing paws or claws transformed into animals, bounding away; others became birds, soaring skyward.

nodes.label: weißfalke | choose | feather
nodes.sentence: Weißfalke chose a white falcon’s feather.

nodes.label: wife | follow | ∅
nodes.sentence: His wife and son followed, each transformed into a white falcon.

nodes.label: they | descend | earth
nodes.sentence: Spreading their wings, they descended together to earth, their eyes reflecting the stars, their flight kissed by the freedom of celestial winds—forever guardians between sky and forest.
